messages.content:
Which of the following statement is correct?
Group of answer choicesGIS allows for the analysis of GPS and remote sensing data, but not the storage of them.
Non-spatial information is unnecessary in GIS analysis.
GIS provides methods to manipulate data in a cell individually or based on the attributes of neighboring cells.
GIS can help analyze forest inventory and forest health, but not stand-level forest structures.
All options are correct.
Compared to GPS and Remote Sensing, field survey can be unnecessary and ineffective.
The statement that is correct is: GIS provides methods to manipulate data in a cell individually or based on the attributes of neighboring cells.
The system of earth-orbiting satellites which can provide the precise location of an object is called
The system of earth-orbiting satellites which can provide the precise location of an object is called the Global Positioning System (GPS).
The use of aircraft or satellites to capture information about Earth's surface is called
The use of aircraft or satellites to capture information about Earth's surface is called remote sensing.
The data collected manually via people is the method of
The data collected manually via people is the method of field survey.

Which of the following statement is true?
Group of answer choicesBoth harvest modelling and yield predictions rely on the model of SIMFOR.
None is correct.
Hydrological analysis need the FORCAST model to evaluate streams and buffers.
All GIS models are wrong due to their simple representations of the reality.
The suitability of a habitat can be informed by the 3D driver simulation.
GIS cannot determine the operability of a forest stand due to its complexity.
No GIS model can help the studies of genetic diversity.
None of the statements are completely true. Only "None is correct" is a true statement as none of the options are correct.

Which of the following statement is NOT true?
Group of answer choicesSIMFOR models can create layers on top of forest stands to indicate the condition of habitats.
3D driver simulation allows forest managers to practically examine the configurations and uniformity of a forest stand.
All options are true.
Models of GIS can degrade the visual quality of landscapes if inefficient algorithms are used.
Global applications of GIS include carbon mapping, sea level mapping, and vegetation mapping.
3D driver simulation allows users to model and experience potential pathways in different landscapes.
The statement that is NOT true is: "All options are true."

Which of the following is incorrect?
Group of answer choicesThe physical element that makes up a computer system of GIS is its hardware.
Model surface can also be essential for building structures in GIS analysis.
All options are correct.
Applications used by the computer to perform special analysis is the software of GIS.
People are at the core of major GIS components.
Methods used produce correct reproducible results are referred to as procedures in GIS components.
GIS has two types of data models only (i.e. raster and vector).

The incorrect statement is: "GIS has two types of data models only (i.e. raster and vector)." 

In addition to raster and vector data models, GIS also has other types of data models such as point cloud, TIN (Triangulated Irregular Network), and others.

Which of the following is NOT an example of the components of GIS?
Group of answer choices

None of the options.

GIS technician

QGIS suite

Model Builder in ArcGIS

Laptop

The option that is NOT an example of the components of GIS is "Laptop." 

A laptop is a computer hardware that can be used to run GIS software but it is not a part of GIS components itself.

Which of the following statement is correct?
Group of answer choices

GIS provides methods to manipulate data in a cell individually or based on the attributes of neighboring cells.

Compared to GPS and Remote Sensing, field survey can be unnecessary and ineffective.

GIS allows for the analysis of GPS and remote sensing data, but not the storage of them.

Non-spatial information is unnecessary in GIS analysis.

GIS can help analyze forest inventory and forest health, but not stand-level forest structures.

All options are correct.
The following statement is correct: "GIS provides methods to manipulate data in a cell individually or based on the attributes of neighboring cells."

Which of the following is incorrect?
Group of answer choices

Applications used by the computer to perform special analysis is the software of GIS.

All options are correct.

The physical element that makes up a computer system of GIS is its hardware.

Methods used produce correct reproducible results are referred to as procedures in GIS components.

GIS has two types of data models only (i.e. raster and vector).

People are at the core of major GIS components.

Model surface can also be essential for building structures in GIS analysis.

The incorrect statement is: "GIS has two types of data models only (i.e. raster and vector)." 

In addition to raster and vector data models, GIS also has other types of data models such as point cloud, TIN (Triangulated Irregular Network), and others.

A GIS model is a complex representation of a phenomenon or system on the Earth's surface.
Group of answer choices

True

False
True.
